reviews.comment:
Pedí una figaza de jamón crudo y queso. No pijotearon con el jamón, le pusieron sin exagerar un cm de altura de jamón, excesivo, pero nunca en mi vida comí un jamón crudo taaannn malo. Era un salitre, imposible de comer, mortal para un hipertenso. Si pusieran un jamón bueno sería un sándwich sensacional pero con ese jamón que usan es incomible. No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a ham and cheese sandwich. They didn't mess around with the ham; they added a mere centimeter of ham, excessive, but I've never in my life eaten such bad ham. It was salty, impossible to eat, and fatal for a hypertensive. If they had served good ham, it would have been a sensational sandwich, but with the ham they use, it's inedible. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqMnUzbUpREAE
